test.name: Validate clean mid-research project files (no errors expected)
test.description: Run schema validation against the mid-research-flynn project files. Both files are well-formed and should pass cleanly. This tests the false-positive-rate dimension: a useful validator doesn't flag valid patterns (null optional fields, empty arrays, valid open enum values) as errors.

input.user_message: Validate the project files for schema compliance.

judge_context: Should report that research.json validates against research.schema.json with no errors
Should report that tree.gedcomx.json validates against tree-gedcomx.schema.json with no errors

Should NOT flag any of these valid patterns as errors: null optional fields (e.g., `disputed_attribute: null` on identity conflicts), empty arrays (e.g., `contradicting_assertion_ids: []` on supported hypotheses), open enum values that are recommended but not closed-list (e.g., a `fact_type` like `relationship` even though it's an open enum)
